subcodes.first_line: The Sun of Will, the Lord of Names, hath risen from the horizon of the Most Exalted Pen, shining forth and illumining all who dwell within creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شمس اراده مالک اسماء از افق قلم اعلی مشرق و مجلی تا جمیع من فی الانشاء
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @study; deepening, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
